name: Shreya Acquisition Group
business: Shreya Acquisition Group is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a business combination with one or more target businesses. The company has no operating history and has not yet identified any specific acquisition target.

exposures.sentence: Our efforts to identify a prospective target business will not be limited to a particular industry or geographic location although we intend to focus our search for a target business on companies engaged in the health and wellness, hospitality, media and entertainment, shipping, infrastructure, and waterways tourism sectors.

catalysts.sentence: We have 12 months from the closing of this offering to consummate our initial business combination.
